description: Sally Parkes began her teaching career in 1998 and is an international yoga teacher trainer and author of best selling books The Manual of Yoga Anatomy and The Healing Yoga Bible. Having delivered many trainings across the globe in Dubai, Doha, Goa and Andalucía, Sally now runs predominantly online yoga teacher training programs in 200hr Hatha Flow Yoga, Pregnancy and Postnatal Yoga, whilst her yoga school, The Sally Parkes Yoga Academy, also hosts Yin Yoga and Fertility Yoga Teacher Training. Sally draws on a softer and more inclusive way of teaching yoga which influences her pregnancy and postnatal yoga teacher training courses. You will find videos here that are suitable for all, regardless of experience and find specialised pre and postnatal classes where Sally talks about specific conditions such as breech baby, diastasis recti and postnatal rehabilitation. description: Ciao!!!! Benvenuto nel mio Canale!!! Sono Elisabetta Baso e insegno Yoga con Entusiasmo e Professionalità da più di 20 anni!!!
